items.briefing:
A newly discovered vulnerability called "SearchLeak" in Microsoft Copilot allows attackers to steal sensitive data with just a single click. If your organisation uses Microsoft Copilot — including within Office 365 or Teams — be cautious about clicking unexpected links or prompts, as this attack can quietly access your files or information without obvious warning signs.

There is nothing else in today's articles requiring urgent action for Australian staff. As a practical tip: if you use Microsoft Copilot at work, avoid clicking unfamiliar links shared through it, and report anything suspicious to your IT team promptly.

featured.title: Government launches Horizon 2 action plan for Australia’s cyber security strategy
featured.quote: Australia's cyber security strategy enters second phase with federal government's new Horizon 2 action plan.
